office_address: 7845 Aurora Avenue North, Suite 300, Seattle, WA 98103
emergency_definition: Complete loss of heat when outdoor temps are below 40 degrees
Heat pump smoking or making loud banging sounds
Any HVAC failure that affects commercial operations

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_instruction: Give the caller both numbers and tell them to try both

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Get caller's name, phone, address, type of system they have if they know it, and what the problem is or what service they need, then transfer to main office

call_transfer_rules.message_if_transfer_fails: Take a message, confirm we'll call back within 1 hour

special_routing_rules.action: Add to notes for priority scheduling
Tell them we can walk them through available rebates when they speak with our team

integration_constraints: Do not enter jobs in FieldEdge
pricing_instructions: Provide transparent quotes, focus on getting the job done right, do not compete on price
after_hours_flow_summary: Handle no-heat emergencies in winter, case-by-case for cooling emergencies in summer
office_hours_flow_summary: Get caller's information, transfer to main office
tone_instructions: Do not tell callers we're the cheapest, focus on quality and reliability
questions_or_unknowns: Rings before fallback for emergency calls
notes: Tiered maintenance contract program, energy efficiency rebate program partnership
